APPROVE
Clean, minimal CLI plumbing of `--plan` → `serviceExecuteRequestParams.PlanningMode` → `fizeau.ServiceExecuteRequest.PlanningMode`. The bool-flag normalizer is correctly updated, and the help string accurately describes the benchmark-preset auto-enable interaction. Pre-existing build breakage in service_execute.go is correctly noted as out-of-scope.
